title: Didymoglossum cuspidatum
taxonomy: Didymoglossum cuspidatum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This family is a part of the order Hymenophyllales. The Hymenophyllales order is a group of epiphytic ferns. They are commonly known as the 'filmy ferns' due to their thin, delicate fronds. The classification of Didymoglossum cuspidatum is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Tracheophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Hymenophyllales, family Hymenophyllaceae, genus Didymoglossum, species D. cuspidatum.

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and respiratory issues, due to its reported antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties.
